description: Baseline: BF16, TP=1, BS=16 (base command default), no quantization
+TP=1 explicit: removes inter-GPU comm overhead on 8B model
batch_size 16→512: second biggest gain, saturates GPU compute
+max_model_len=2668: dataset minimum (2540+128). 148x concurrency vs 3x at default
+expandable_segments:True: root cause fix for all mid-run segfaults
+sort queries by input length: mean latency -24%, throughput +0.7%
+enable_prefix_caching=False: CNN DailyMail has zero cache hit rate
batch_size 512→1024: +3.4% throughput. BS=2048 regresses. Optimal confirmed.
